data.title: DESIGN.md: drop closed 'Accepted divergences' (#1a1a1a, Inter) + refresh line refs

data.body:
PASS. Reviewed cold against plan + acceptance criteria.

Diff: 1 file (DESIGN.md), +8/-10 — matches impl report exactly.

Acceptance checks:
- YAML front matter untouched (ends line 94, first hunk at line 105).
- Lint: 0 errors, 27 warnings, 1 info — unchanged from baseline.
- grep OctahedronHero.tsx -> only :410-419, no :404-413 remaining.
- grep 'four sites still|still use.*1a1a1a' -> empty.
- grep 'currently has --font-sans|not yet implemented' -> empty.
- grep 6B4C9A -> 4 occurrences, all expected (Don't rule, prose explanation, Lab section, houses.ts:319 divergence).
- grep 'vertex 4' -> 2 occurrences, both reference Story node (FRAC-47), neither is 'Coming Soon placeholder'.
- Forward-looking rules preserved verbatim: 'Don't use raw 1a1a1a' (line 316), 'Don't use raw 6B4C9A' (317), 'house-publications-accent' Don't rule (180), 'charcoal-deep' Don't rule (184).

Source-of-truth sanity:
- OctahedronHero.tsx:410-419 contains FACE_SECTION_MAP with order campus,events,lab,school,neighborhood,people,forum,story — confirmed.
- src/index.css:1 has Inter in @import url; line 6 sets --font-sans: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif — confirmed.
- src/data/houses.ts:319 has color: '#6B4C9A' — confirmed.

Structural:
- Accepted divergences list has exactly 2 items (cream HSL math + houses.ts:319 color deferral) and reads naturally.
- Prose flows naturally throughout; no orphan sentences or botched edits.
- New OctahedronHero component blurb correctly reframes vertex 4 as Story node while preserving the Political Club hidden-from-Navbar context.
- Charcoal-drift note now policy-only as planned; Inter blurb cleanly says 'declared font-sans' + 'imported + assigned'.

No concerns or nitpicks. Matches plan exactly.
